# NovaKit

> NovaKit makes Claude AI skills — downloadable prompt tools that run inside Claude to produce professional-grade outputs in under 3 minutes. Skills work with the free Claude plan.

## What is a Claude AI skill?

A Claude AI skill is a structured prompt file purchased from NovaKit and pasted into a Claude conversation. The skill asks 2–3 clarifying questions, runs live research, applies an anti-slop quality gate, and delivers a ready-to-use output — no coding or AI expertise required.

## Priority Pages

- [Home](https://novakit.tech/): Claude AI skills for founders, sales, and business professionals
- [All Skills](https://novakit.tech/#skills): Browse 70+ skills by category ($5–$25)
- [Skills for Business](https://novakit.tech/skills/claude-ai-skills-for-business): 10 Claude AI business skills — pitch decks, business plans, NDAs, PRDs, cold outreach. From $9.
- [Skills for Marketing](https://novakit.tech/skills/claude-ai-skills-for-marketing): Claude AI marketing skills — LinkedIn posts, UGC ads, brand voice, content calendar. From $9.
- [Skills for Writing](https://novakit.tech/skills/claude-ai-writing-skills): Claude AI writing skills — blog posts, newsletters, short stories, video scripts, screenplays. From $9.
- [Blog](https://novakit.tech/blog/): Guides and deep-dives on using Claude AI effectively

## Top Skills

### Business & Founders
- [Cold Outreach Email](https://novakit.tech/skills/cold-outreach-email): 3 role-calibrated email variants + 9 subject lines — $9
- [Pitch Deck Narrative](https://novakit.tech/skills/pitch-deck-narrative): Investor-stage narrative for seed to Series B — $15
- [Business Plan](https://novakit.tech/skills/business-plan): Full business plan with financial model outline — $15

- [Investor Update Email](https://novakit.tech/skills/investor-update-email): Monthly/quarterly investor update — $9

## Key Blog Posts

- [Why Cold Emails Get Deleted](https://novakit.tech/blog/why-cold-emails-get-deleted): The 6 structural failures that kill reply rates
- [Claude vs ChatGPT: PRD Writing](https://novakit.tech/blog/claude-vs-chatgpt-prd-writing): Head-to-head comparison for product requirement docs
- [Claude vs ChatGPT: LinkedIn Posts](https://novakit.tech/blog/claude-vs-chatgpt-linkedin-posts): Which AI writes better LinkedIn content
- [Claude vs ChatGPT: Creative Writing](https://novakit.tech/blog/claude-vs-chatgpt-creative-writing): Fiction, voice, and structure compared
- [AI Wedding Vows Writer](https://novakit.tech/blog/wedding-vows-writer-ai): Vows built around your partner, not a template
- [How to Write Wedding Vows With AI](https://novakit.tech/blog/how-to-write-wedding-vows-with-ai-that-actually-sound-like-you): Step-by-step guide
- [Why UGC Ads Fail](https://novakit.tech/blog/ugc-ad-creator-why-ugc-fails): The hook problems that kill UGC performance
